utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five keys. Next, check if each is fully specified with required details: - health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance for named individuals and provides a total cost; this satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' - property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance and a cost; satisfies requirement. - travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance and a cost; satisfies requirement. - additional_services: provides an enhancement service and its cost; satisfies requirement. - total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown; satisfies requirement. All five items are present and include the necessary details.
